description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5 Docker image. Add a before_script that runs ruby -v, installs bundler 2.3.27 with gem install bundler -v 2.3.27, and runs bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, and cache the vendor/ruby directory. Include the Dependency-Scanning.gitlab-ci.yml template. Define an rspec job that executes bundle exec rspec spec, and a rubocop job that executes bundle exec rubocop; both run in the default test stage with no extra rules.
